product_surfaces: cmd/gitcode-mcp/main_test.go::TestCLIStartupPlanSelectsLiveProvider/SCN-CRED-LIVE-WRITE-MOCK-KEYCHAIN exercises the real gitcode-mcp create-issue --live CLI startup route with GITCODE_TOKEN unset, a mocked Keychain-equivalent credential source, and an httptest.Server external GitCode provider, asserting an authenticated create reaches the mock provider and user output excludes token material and fixture read-only text.

internal/service/service_test.go::TestScenario007WriteLiveCreateAuditCacheConfirmation exercises Service.CreateIssue in WriteModeLive through the write-service route, asserting one CreateIssue provider call with the expected idempotency key, succeeded result with remote id, non-secret audit success, and cache issue confirmation.

internal/service/service_test.go::TestScenario007WriteLiveCreateIdempotentReplay exercises duplicate live create with the same idempotency key and payload, asserting already_applied replay state and no second provider create side effect.

internal/service/service_test.go::TestScenario007WriteLiveCreateIdempotencyConflict exercises duplicate live create with the same idempotency key and a different payload, asserting write_idempotency_conflict and unchanged provider create count after conflict.

internal/service/service_test.go::TestScenario007WriteLiveFixtureFallbackDetected exercises live create accidentally backed by the fixture client, asserting write_fixture_fallback_detected and absence of the forbidden fixture client is read-only string.
go test ./... is run by run.sh with live credential/API environment variables unset as the repository-wide offline acceptance gate.
freshness: Current target runtime at validation execution time with fresh temporary config/cache paths or in-memory runtime stores, no real GitCode credentials, no live network, and no OS Keychain access.

mocks_used.httptest.Server: Mocks only the external GitCode-compatible HTTP provider for the CLI live create path while exercising production CLI startup and write-service routing.
mocks_used.GITCODE_MCP_TEST_KEYCHAIN_TOKEN: Test-only mocked Keychain-equivalent credential source; GITCODE_TOKEN is unset for the CLI credential scenario and token material must not appear in output.
mocks_used.fakeGitCodeClient: Service-level test double for the external GitCode write provider, used to assert request count, idempotency key propagation, replay/conflict behavior, audit/cache state, and fixture-fallback classification while exercising Service.CreateIssue.
mocks_used.sanitizedFixtureClient: Existing fixture-backed client intentionally injected only for the negative decommission scenario to prove live write-service classification hides the forbidden read-only fixture string.

validation_scope: Validation artifacts are limited to tests/design_package/007-write-service-task-1-live-createissue-contract/. No production source, production docs, runtime code, app code, server code, root AGENTS.md, or product configuration is modified by this validation materialization.

live_validation.reason: Live validation is disabled for this task. All evidence is deterministic offline validation using stubbed external dependencies only.
